messages.noSimulationsInfo: No simulations yet. Complete simulations to build your profile automatically.
messages.resetConfirm: Reset all Basic Info to template defaults?

businessProfile.title: Business Profile
businessProfile.subtitle: Manage your business information and extracted patterns
businessProfile.businessInfoHint: Edit your business details. These help create realistic simulations.
businessProfile.industryHint: Change this to get different simulation scenarios
businessProfile.serviceHint: Describe what you do. Used to create realistic client questions.
businessProfile.budgetPlaceholder: What budget do clients typically have?
businessProfile.extractedIntro: Your business profile is automatically built from your simulations. Complete more simulations to improve accuracy.
businessProfile.leadChatHint: Send this URL to a prospect to test the AI as it speaks for your business (same profile as go-live).
businessProfile.readinessTitle: Your profile is ready to go live! ({{pct}}% complete)
businessProfile.readinessTitleGates: Your profile has passed all Go-Live gates!
businessProfile.readinessBody: Review your extracted patterns and approve to activate AI lead conversations.
businessProfile.liveBanner: Your AI is live and actively qualifying leads.
businessProfile.qualificationEmpty: Not yet extracted. Run the Wrong Fit or Skeptical Lead scenario to capture qualification signals.
businessProfile.objectionEmpty: Not yet extracted. Run the Price Objection or Skeptical Lead scenario to capture objection playbooks.
businessProfile.decisionEmpty: Not yet extracted. Complete more simulations to capture discovery, value, and closing patterns.
businessProfile.notBuiltBody: Complete simulations to train your AI and build your business profile. The system will extract your:
